entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used for transcriptomic studies and hybrid breeding

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC STUDIES
entities.description: Studies of the transcriptome to understand gene functions and molecular mechanisms

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: High-throughput DNA sequencing technology used in transcriptomics

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A sequencing method used for transcript detection and quantification of expression levels

entities.name: GENE FUNCTIONS
entities.description: The roles and activities of genes within an organism

entities.name: MOLECULAR MECHANISMS
entities.description: The molecular-level processes that lead to a specific biological outcome

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC TRAITS
entities.description: Observable characteristics of an organism resulting from gene expression

entities.name: THREE-LINE HYBRID BREEDING SYSTEM
entities.description: A well-established but cumbersome breeding system in pigeonpea

entities.name: TWO-LINE HYBRID BREEDING SYSTEM
entities.description: A proposed alternative breeding system to the three-line system

entities.name: TEMPERATURE-SENSITIVE MALE STERILE
entities.description: A trait where male sterility is controlled by temperature

entities.name: TETRAD STAGE
entities.description: The critical developmental stage for temperature-sensitive male sterility

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The environmental factor specifically 23°C affecting male sterility

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes suspected to be involved in fertility reversion

entities.name: ABSCISIC ACID SIGNALING
entities.description: The signaling pathway involving abscisic acid that affects fertility reversion

entities.name: FERTILITY REVERSION
entities.description: The process of returning to a fertile state from a sterile state

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION ATLAS
entities.description: A resource known as CcGEA providing transcriptomic profiles for pod and seed development

entities.name: POD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of pod formation and growth

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of seed formation and growth

entities.name: GENE NETWORK
entities.description: A group of co-expressed genes working together

entities.name: REGULATORY GENES
entities.description: Genes that control the expression of other genes

entities.name: POLLEN SPECIFIC SF3
entities.description: A gene involved in pollen fertility

entities.name: SUCROSE-PROTON SYMPORTER
entities.description: A gene involved in pollen fertility

entities.name: POLLEN FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of pollen to fertilize the ovule

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per plant or area

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The improvement in genetic value of a crop population over time
